Rule.name: six_direct_connector_access
Rule.Description: Directly invoke operations on connected endpoints

Argument.name: title
Argument.Description: Descriptive name for the action executed upon submitting this form (metaparameter)

Argument.name: application
Argument.Description: Endpoint to access. "IIQ" for role provisioning.

Argument.name: operation
Argument.Description: Choose the operation to invoke on the connector

Argument.name: objectType
Argument.Description: Object type to read or write to

Argument.name: maxObjects
Argument.Description: Maximum number of objects to iterate

Argument.name: nativeIdentity
Argument.Description: Account to read or write to, for account creation via the provisioning engine name of the identity.

Argument.name: provisioningOperation
Argument.Description: Choose the operation to invoke on the account

Argument.name: attributeOperation
Argument.Description: Choose the operation to invoke on the attribute

Argument.name: attributeName
Argument.Description: Attribute to modify on the account

Argument.name: attributeValue
Argument.Description: Value to submit add/remove/set the attribute to

Argument.name: useProvisioner
Argument.Description: Submit the provisioning operation to the IIQ provisioning engine instead of the connector directly. This will cause a regular plan compile including evaluation of provisioning policies. For account creation, set the native identity to the identity name.

Argument.name: runInBackground
Argument.Description: Enable for long-running iterations to get the result sent by email
